content: Supply-chain cooldown pinning for npm: use --before=<date> with npm-registry-fetch or npm pack to resolve 'latest as of date X'; npm audit signatures can fail (ETARGET) for lockfile-pinned versions younger than min-release-age even when already installed — a known npm CLI bug. Record resolved versions into a lockfile artifact (package-lock.json + resolved version manifest). For go install: use @v<exact-version> flag; gopin CLI automates pinning go install commands. The go.mod/go.sum together record the full dependency tree deterministically. Auditing: commit lockfiles so diffs show every transitive change.
